privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real FITS data downloaded from NASA GSFC. While the task metadata claims the target is M74 (NGC 628), the actual FITS file header explicitly identifies the object as NGC 4151. The task instructions mandate a plate scale of 1.14 arcsec/pixel (the nominal UIT scale), though the provided image is 4x binned. The distance parameters (9.8 Mpc, 9800 kpc) are verified as consistent with the instructions for M74. Expected output paths are verified against the setup script and task instructions.
